arts.ttl: Liverpool, PSG Target Sees €20M Gap With Napoli Amid Extension Talks
arts.sum: FC Barcelona, Liverpool, and Paris Saint-Germain are reportedly among the clubs showing interest in Napoli’s Khvicha Kvaratskhelia. Reports that contract extension talks between the player and Napoli are stalling have encouraged these teams. arts.ttl: PSG, Real Madrid Can Afford €100M-Rated Bayern Munich Transfer Target
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen’s attacking midfielder Florian Wirtz will be in high demand next summer transfer window. arts.ttl: PSG Standout Had No Interest in Real Madrid Reunion With Mbappé
arts.sum: On Thursday, RMC Sport reported that Achraf Hakimi has extended his contract with Paris Saint-Germain until 2029. Despite the rumors linking him to Real Madrid, the 26-year-old will stay in the French capital for a long time.
